name: Boom Bloom
description: Boom Bloom is a mutant plant who is the Life Sensei of the Ninja Battle Class in Skylanders: Imaginators. She is available in the Enchanted Elven Forest Adventure Pack and is the main character of the fourth Skylanders: Ring of Heroes Episode Dungeon, The Flower that Bloomed from Scrap.
biography: Boom Bloom was created in the laboratory of a mad scientist! After using his mutation goo to change deadwood into evil creatures, Dr. Krankcase began experimenting with live plants! But it had a much different effect. Instead of becoming subservient villains, the mutated plants instantly rebelled against their creator and tried to destroy his goo factory. Dr. Krankcase and his henchmen were able to thwart all of these insurgent plants, except for one - Boom Bloom! Her mutation gave her extraordinary Ninja skills and a thorny whip, which she used to unleash a flurry of martial arts moves that forced Dr. Krankcase to flee his own factory and vow never to experiment on plants again. Now as a Sensei of the Ninja class, she uses her incredible abilities to teach new Skylanders how to protect nature... and unleash its fury!
personality: Boom Bloom is soft spoken and polite, rarely using contractions. Despite this, she's headstrong and insensitive, making rash decisions without much thought and is easily confused and embarrassed. She still retains her memories of when she was a living tree, as well as the feelings of the ones that used to be with her.

story.content: Boom Bloom was created in the laboratory of a mad scientist! After using his mutation goo to change deadwood into evil creatures, Dr. Krankcase began experimenting with live plants! But it had a much different effect. Instead of becoming subservient villains, the mutated plants instantly rebelled against their creator and tried to destroy his goo factory. Dr. Krankcase and his henchmen were able to thwart all of these insurgent plants, except for one - Boom Bloom! Her mutation gave her extraordinary Ninja skills and a thorny whip, which she used to unleash a flurry of martial arts moves that forced Dr. Krankcase to flee his own factory and vow never to experiment on plants again. Now as a Sensei of the Ninja class, she uses her incredible abilities to teach new Skylanders how to protect nature... and unleash its fury!

Boom Bloom's Episode Dungeon expands on her origins. As soon as Boom Bloom was reformed into her current appearance, she became overwhelmed by her newfound sense of emotions and rampaged around Dr. Krankcase's Abandoned Factory. Skylanders Flameslinger, Food Fight, Smolderdash and Tree Rex were assigned to investigate the disturbance and discovered Boom Bloom and other plantlike creatures wrecking the lab in their attempts to get revenge on Dr. Krankcase.

content: Hear my voice, Portal Master, for it is the voice of someone who will make your Imaginators grow strong. - Sensei Training Bonus
And if they want to really blossom, give your Ninjas plenty of sunlight, water, and my Secret Technique. - Secret Technique Bonus
Dear enemies, your doom is in bloom! - ringing a Battle Gong
Must be the season of the whip! - before a battle.
Can't we all just get along?
Nature does not hurry, yet everything is accomplished. - after a battle.
The land is mine to explore! - opening a gate.
I have blossomed into more awesomeness! - leveling up.
My stats continue to blossom and grow. - checking stats.
It's like a beautiful garden - of numbers!

trivia: Boom Bloom's 'hair' resembles succulent plants, a classification for plants with fleshy, thick leaves. The classification includes cacti, asparagus and aloe, which resembles the 'hair' the most with its reddish leaf tips.
Boom Bloom is the third ninja Life Skylander, after Stealth Elf and Stink Bomb.
She is also the third Life Skylander to be a mutated plant, after Tree Rex and Food Fight.
Boom Bloom and Dr. Neo Cortex are the only Senseis to not have weapons of their battle class. Though she can fire the projectiles from her pigtail leaves, her primary weapon is a whip.
Boom Bloom is one of the few Skylanders to have 'boom' in their name.
Boom Bloom is the second life Skylander whose name contains the word 'Boom' (the first being Shroomboom).
Coincidentally, both Bloom Boom and Shroomboom were created through a villain's efforts.
Despite the official renderings of her figure, Boom Bloom, unlike the other Senseis, has the Life element symbol on her base instead of the Ninja battle class symbol.
On the Skylanders Website, her catchphrase was in a noticeably deeper voice.
Though Boom Bloom is of the Ninja class, none of her abilities relate to throwing blades; instead, she specializes in their secondary abilities of trapping enemies and crowd control.
Boom Bloom was the last Sensei (not counting the villains) added to Ring of Heroes.
She was also the last Skylander added to Ring of Heroes before the game was announced to be rebooted.
Boom Bloom is the only Skylander to have an episode dungeon in the revamp of ROH.

trailers.name: Meet Master Boom Bloom Skylanders Imaginators Skylanders
Skylanders Imaginators - Boom Bloom Soul Gem Preview

gameplay: Boom Bloom is a Ninja Sensei who utilizes a thorny vine whip for rapid combos. Her gameplay focuses on crowd control using Vine Entwine to pull enemies together and Spore Seeds which can be strategically deployed and detonated for area damage. She can also utilize a powerful Sky-Chi attack involving a massive vine spin.

basic.name: Whip Whap
basic.content: Press Attack 1 to swiftly snap your whip in front of you. Combos up to four times.

basic.name: Vine Entwine
basic.content: Tap Attack 2 to send vines out that pull enemies in after a short time. Hold Attack 2 to have the vines go farther before grabbing enemies.

basic_upgrades.name: Spore Seeds
basic_upgrades.content: Press Attack 3 to grow Spore Seeds that damage enemies.

basic_upgrades.name: Puff of Pollen
basic_upgrades.content: Whip Whap does more damage and Spore Seeds now release damaging pollen when hit.

basic_upgrades.name: Spore Shower
basic_upgrades.content: Vine Entwine now pulls Spore Seeds in for a shower of seeking spikes.

basic_upgrades.name: Plenty of Plants
basic_upgrades.content: Have a total of four Spore Seeds active at a time.

soulgems.name: Petal to the Mettle
soulgems.content: Hold Attack 1 to rev up a vine wheel that explodes into four Spore Seeds.

wow_pows.name: Whipper Snapper
wow_pows.content: The ultimate Sensei Attack! Hold Special Attack to go for a spin with a Sensei-tionally large vine. Move with Left Stick to whip your enemies into shape!

abilities.name: Potent Pollen
abilities.content: When hit, Spore Seeds cover a larger area and do more damage.

abilities.name: Thorn Thrasher
abilities.content: Whip Whap does more damage and Spore Seeds shoot seeking spikes when hit.

abilities.name: In Full Bloom
abilities.content: Spore Seeds can cause an explosion when they are hit enough times.

abilities.name: Greener Grasps
abilities.content: Vine Entwine's pull reaches farther and does more damage.

abilities.name: Spikey Situations
abilities.content: Vine Entwine's burrowing spikes hit wider and do more damage.

abilities.name: Hungry Herbivore
abilities.content: Vine Entwine now grows a plant that explodes for each pulled Spore Seed.
